name: Trello (npx)
description: Manage Trello boards, lists, cards, comments, attachments, checklists, and custom fields via the Trello REST API. Provides 40+ tools with built-in rate limiting and workspace navigation.

inputs.label: Trello API Key
inputs.description: Your Trello API key. Obtain it from the Trello Power-Ups admin / app-key page while logged in.

obtain.instructions:
1. Log in to Trello
2. Open https://trello.com/app-key
3. Copy the API Key shown at the top of the page

inputs.label: Trello Token
inputs.description: Trello API token generated from your API key. Grants the server access to act on your behalf.

obtain.instructions:
1. Open https://trello.com/app-key
2. Under the API Key, click the 'Token' link (Manually generate a Token)
3. Approve the requested permissions
4. Copy the generated token

inputs.label: Default Board ID
inputs.description: Optional default Trello board ID (deprecated). Can be omitted and changed at runtime via the set_active_board tool.

auth.instructions: Get your API key at https://trello.com/app-key, then generate a token from that page (Manually generate a Token) and approve the requested permissions.
